title: Calendar Tetris Champion
content: I once fit a board meeting, a dentist appointment, and a school pickup into the same two-hour window. Three locations. Zero overlap. Calendar Tetris champion. It can be done.
extended_content: Everyone said it was impossible. The board meeting ran long sometimes. Traffic was unpredictable. The school had a strict pickup window. But I mapped it out: meeting room closest to the exit, dentist office on the route to school, buffer time built into each transition. It took thirty minutes of planning to save two hours of chaos. That's the real efficiency equation.
when_to_tell: when helping with complex scheduling challenges
lesson: Impossible schedules just need better planning
